title: Secret Message Copy
description: A spy-themed fine-motor copying game where kids rebuild short words letter by letter from left to right.
learningGoals: Copy short letter strings one part at a time
Hear each copied word spelled and read aloud
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap text letter cards into ghost slots
feedbackModel: Correct letters pop, sparkle, and speak their name; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished messages are spelled and read aloud.
credits: Kaigani; text cards rendered by the shared build-assemble engine. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
